callGraph.callee:
sort_fn(symbols)
    .filter((el) => composition[el] && composition[el] > 0)
    .map((el) => {
      const amount = composition[el]
      if (amount === 1) return el
      const formatted_amount = format_num(Number(amount), amount_format)
      return plain_text
        ? `${el}${formatted_amount}`
        : `${el}<sub>${formatted_amount}</sub>`
    })
    .join
